use_cases: Add smooth animated cursor with spring physics to replace default browser cursor
Display custom SVG cursor element that follows mouse movement fluidly
Enhance portfolio and creative websites with interactive cursor effects
Provide configurable cursor appearance for product showcases
Create branded cursor experiences with custom styling
ai_summary: A smooth cursor component that uses motion/react spring physics for fluid cursor following. Accepts a custom cursor element with configurable spring animation parameters including damping, stiffness, and mass. The default implementation features a minimal arrow cursor design, but supports any JSX element as the cursor. Ideal for adding premium interactive polish to portfolio sites, SaaS products, and creative web experiences.
